title: Playz SMP
description: A SMP where you have fun you can get superpowers or miraculous and fight it out against each other to see who is powerful.
body:
![Sponsor ](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f69c5ff58ef061c0e6fadee4a7a4a8f00e3fcaf3_0.webp)


[Use this link to order your server!!!](https://billing.kinetichosting.com/aff.php?aff=1234) 








Welcome! We're a friendly and welcoming community where everyone is treated with respect. If any staff member is ever unfair or mean to a player, the owner will take action to ensure fairness.

**In this server, you can become any hero you want! We also have a create mod and a variety of addons to enhance your experience. Join us and have fun!**

Let me know if you want any tweaks! 😊
